title: lamium glaberrimum
intro: Lamium glaberrimum, also known as yellow archangel, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its yellow and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lamium glaberrimum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be used externally as a topical application for skin conditions and wounds.
